message:
perf: SIMD optimizations for hot paths

- math.zig: remove redundant dotVec() multiply in dot() reduction,
  use @reduce(.Add) directly; use @mulAdd in addScaled()
- rotation.zig: use @mulAdd() in rowDot() for guaranteed FMA on
  WASM relaxed SIMD (f32x4.relaxed_madd)
- polar.zig: unroll decodeInto() and dotProduct() 2 pairs at a time
  with f32x4 SIMD accumulation and vectorized stores

All 56 tests pass. Quality unchanged (cosine ~0.965, dot error ~0.01).

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "turboquant-wasm",
-  "version": "0.2.0",
+  "version": "0.2.1",
   "description": "TurboQuant WASM SIMD vector compression — 3 bits/dim with fast dot product. Requires relaxed SIMD (Chrome 114+, Firefox 128+, Safari 18+, Node 20+)",
   "type": "module",
   "main": "dist/index.js",
